Index.title: IT Company - Innovative Solutions
Index.description: We build the future through code.

Hero.description: We create digital ecosystems that transform brands. High-performance code, intelligent SEO, and visual perfection in one solution.

Portfolio.label: Portfolio
Portfolio.proj1_desc: Web3 game ranked in the <bold>Top-10 on Telegram</bold>. Developed core mechanics, live multiplayer, and a complex in-game economy. Integrated TON for trading, deposits, and token withdrawals.
Portfolio.proj2_desc: Swiss auto leasing platform. Built a B2C funnel (rate calculator, e-signature, KYC) and a fully-featured B2B back-office for dealers and banks.
Portfolio.proj3_desc: Bilingual e-commerce platform with a custom admin panel. Integrated KeyCRM for order management, Monobank API for payments, Cloudinary, and Resend. Deep SEO and SSR architecture.
Portfolio.proj4_desc: Large-scale B2B system for managing share registries and compliance. Split into two web apps within a TypeScript monorepo (Turborepo). Developed a shared UI library, complex form flows, and auto-generated API clients. Powerful FastAPI backend with Celery workers for database scraping.
